last_updated_focus: Reordered subskills around four foundation steps: user need understanding, user data inspection, DAG building, and design planning; renumbered analysis subskills accordingly.
notes: Preliminary skill package. The subskill architecture now starts with user need understanding, data inspection/preprocessing, DAG building, and design planning before routing to analysis/modeling subskills. The top-level skill behavior is intentionally left for a later discussion.
